_notes: Labeled evaluation set for the AI Middleman pipeline. Phrased deliberately differently from the few-shot examples baked into intent_classifier.py's prompt, so this measures generalization rather than memorized examples.

intent.text: Any solid corporate lawyers you know in Frankfurt?
Who's good for private equity out in New York?
Need someone senior in real estate finance based in Dubai
hey can u connect me w a healthcare vc in boston
any leveraged finance ppl in london u kno
Trying to raise a Series A - know good fintech investors?
My company needs an M&A advisor, any names?
Who should I talk to about structured credit in Hong Kong?
Hiring a CFO soon, anyone spring to mind?
Could you put me in touch with someone at Kirkland & Ellis?
Yo what's good
Movie night this weekend still on?
Appreciate you covering for me at the meeting
Ring me later, I'm swamped rn
Crazy how the markets are behaving lately huh
Confirmed
haha no way, that's wild
Congrats on the promotion!!
Watched the match last night, wild finish
Running behind, be there in 10

matching.query: I need a leveraged finance MD in London for a mid-market buyout
Find me a direct lending specialist in Dubai
Connect me with an M&A lawyer at a top firm in London
Find a healthcare venture capital principal in Boston
Need an energy infrastructure investor in Amsterdam
Looking for an investment banking VP in Singapore
Connect me with a private credit principal in Mumbai
Find a corporate lawyer at Kirkland & Ellis
Real estate investment chairman in Dubai
Someone in Johannesburg who does corporate law
matching._note: Johannesburg isn't in the seed dataset - correct behavior is an honest low-confidence/no-match, NOT a hallucinated JHB contact

matching.query: Any private equity partners in Dubai I should meet?
matching._note: regression: after stopword+relevance-ranking fix, Stage 1 must surface PE/Finance in Dubai, not random Dubai contacts

matching.query: Do you know any energy investors in Amsterdam?
matching._note: regression: must surface Energy partners in Amsterdam, not London tech people

matching.query: Do you know anyone from JPMorgan in a senior position?
matching._note: regression: 'JPMorgan' (no space) must still match 'JP Morgan' (DB spelling) and rank Partner/MD/Director above Analyst/Associate

followup._note: Deterministic (no LLM/API) check of _resolve_selected_contacts: after a draft suggests these three people, which does Sam's follow-up pick? Guards against both misses ('connect me with John' must pick John) and false positives ('John's too junior' must NOT pick John).

cases.text: okay connect me with John
connect me with John and Sally
Sally should be perfect, shot me their details
the second one works
both of them please
both of them
connect me with all three
connect me with them
sure connect me with dem
what about them?
send me David and John's details
great, go with the first one
John is too junior, anyone else?
what does David do again?
actually I need a lawyer in Dubai instead
yeah
acount with them
connect me with all of em
okay acount with them please
are they any good?

update_intent._note: Tests is_update detection by IntentClassifier. Checks: (a) real updates are detected, (b) the right attribute is extracted, (c) contact requests and chit-chat are NOT flagged as updates.

cases.text: I heard Aaron Acosta works at Deloitte now
Sarah left McKinsey, she's at BCG now
Thabo got promoted to Managing Director
I moved to Yoco, not Takealot anymore
My email changed to sam@yoco.com
My new number is 082 555 1234
David Chen is now based in Singapore
I actually work at Yoco now
Do you know any good lawyers in London?
Can you connect me with someone in private equity?
Hey how are you doing?
Thanks for yesterday
Are we still on for dinner?

named_contact_intent._note: Tests named_contact extraction: is_request=true messages asking about ONE specific person by name must extract that name; role/company/sector searches must leave it null even though is_request is still true.

cases.text: Do you know Aaron Aguirre? Do you have his details?
Do you have Sarah Chen's number?
Is David Cohen still someone you know?
Do you know any good lawyers in London?
Do you know anyone from JPMorgan in a senior position?
Can you connect me with someone in private equity?
I need a CFO for my startup, anyone come to mind?

language_guard._note: Deterministic (no LLM/API) check of _looks_nguni_not_afrikaans: real isiZulu must be flagged as NOT Afrikaans (so the classifier's occasional 'Afrikaans' guess for genuine Zulu text gets overridden to English), while real Afrikaans and English must NOT be flagged.

cases.text: Ngifuna ummuntu kwiEnergy sector
cases._note: real isiZulu, seen live drafted in Afrikaans before this guard existed

cases.text: Ngidinga ummeli waseLondon wamashishini
Sawubona Sam
ek soek William williams
cases._note: real Afrikaans - must NOT trigger the guard

cases.text: Ken jy iemand wat n korporatiewe prokureur is in Londen?
Any solid corporate lawyers you know in Frankfurt?
This is amazing, thank you
cases._note: guards against false-positiving on English words like amazing/abandon
